name: SP: Door-to-Door Justice Tour
objective: Verify household living standards and discuss land redistribution.
mainMessage: Socialist Party: Justice, Equity and Peace. We are here to listen to the working class.
talkingPoints: Land: Every family deserves a plot for shelter and farming.
Healthcare: Our plan for truly free healthcare at the point of need.
Equity: Ending the massive gap between the rich and the poor.

questions.prompt: Do you own the land your house is built on?

name: SP: Village Workers Council
objective: Mobilize community workers and farmers around labor rights.
mainMessage: Workers of Zambia Unite: Building a better future for our children.
talkingPoints: Education: Ensuring quality school access for all village children.

name: SP: Munali Hub Broadcast
objective: Mass awareness of upcoming workers' rights town halls.
mainMessage: SP: Join the People's Assembly! This Sunday at UNZA grounds. Your voice is your power!

name: SP: National Justice Rally
objective: Mobilize support for the 2026 Manifesto and announce labor reforms.
mainMessage: Socialist Party: Justice for the poor. Free healthcare and land rights for all workers.
talkingPoints: Miners Rights: Nationalizing strategic mining interests.
Farmers: Guaranteed floor prices for all small-scale farmers.
